title: Runlet Output
description: Structured representation of a runlet skill output. The skill outputs markdown with an embedded JSON summary block (RUNLET_SUMMARY). This schema defines the extractable structure for programmatic validation and agent pings.

known_focuses.description: All focus axes known for this user. Enables focus swap re-sort.

kill.description: Number of Kill or Delegate tasks.

top_task.description: The single most important task for the day (first Do First item, or first Block Time if no Do First).

carried.description: Task descriptions carried from a previous day's runlist.

tasks.description: All tasks in the runlist with classification metadata.

quadrant.description: Which quadrant this task was assigned to.

moves_focus.description: Whether this task advances the current PRIMARY focus within 30 days.

focuses.description: All focuses this task advances (e.g., ['Money', 'Career']). Enables focus swap re-sort without re-classifying.

carried_from.description: Date this task was originally created, if carried forward. Null if new.

entry_point.description: Entry point hint for Block Time tasks. Null for other quadrants.

kill_reason.description: Reason for killing/delegating. Null for non-kill tasks.

batch_group.description: Context group label for Batch tasks. Null for other quadrants.
